title: Verify Engagement section shows top similar content if consumption is > 90%
description: Test that after a user finishes 90% of their acquired content, the Engagement section recommends the top content in a similar genre.
preconditions: User has acquired content and watched > 90%
User is on the Trial Corner screen

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the Trial Corner screen

expected_result: A new, recommended content item from a similar genre is displayed.
